notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Pitcher Ryan Weathers picks off Carson Williams at 1st on throw to first baseman Paul Goldschmidt.

notableEvents.label: Junior Caminero GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Junior Caminero grounds into a double play, shortstop José Caballero to second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr. to first baseman Paul Goldschmidt. Jonathan Aranda out at 2nd. Junior Caminero out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Richie Palacios pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Richie Palacios pops out to first baseman Paul Goldschmidt.

notableEvents.label: Walk-off loss
notableEvents.detail: Aaron Judge homers (17) on a fly ball to right center field. Max Schuemann scores.

notableEvents.label: Aaron Judge GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Aaron Judge grounds into a double play, third baseman Junior Caminero to second baseman Carson Williams to first baseman Jonathan Aranda. Trent Grisham out at 2nd. Aaron Judge out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Austin Wells GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Austin Wells grounds into a double play, shortstop Taylor Walls to first baseman Jonathan Aranda. Ryan McMahon out at 2nd. Austin Wells out at 1st.

notableEvents.detail: Aaron Judge homers (17) on a fly ball to right center field. Max Schuemann scores.
